name: PULMONIC INSUFFICIENCY / REGURGITATION
dominant_finding: inadequate apposition of cusp at end-diastole
discriminating_features: inadequate apposition of cusp at end-diastole
dilatation of pulmonic ring + pulmonary artery
± late diastolic forward flow in pulmonary trunk with each atrial contraction →
accurately quantified with through-plane (true transverse with < 15° angulation)

CT: inadequate apposition of cusp at end-diastole
dilatation of pulmonic ring + pulmonary artery
± late diastolic forward flow in pulmonary trunk with each atrial contraction →
accurately quantified with through-plane (true transverse with < 15° angulation)
